title: Pappobolus szyszylowiczii
taxonomy: Pappobolus szyszylowiczii is a member of the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. This classification is based on its characteristics, including its flower structure and leaf arrangement. Within the Asteraceae family, Pappobolus szyszylowiczii belongs to the tribe Heliantheae, which includes many species of sunflowers and daisies. The tribe Heliantheae is further divided into several subtribes, with Pappobolus szyszylowiczii likely being a member of one of these subtribes. Further research is needed to determine the exact classification of Pappobolus szyszylowiczii at the subtribe level.
